TEST.0.title: 2026 Division C Regional Test - January Extra

CIPHER.437.cipherString: Smile in the mirror. Do that every morning and you'll start to see a big difference in your life.
CIPHER.437.question: Your solar-powered calculator started flashing this Aristocrat sequence—it's Yoko Ono's words. What does it say?
CIPHER.437.author: Yoko Ono

CIPHER.436.cipherString: Every statesman must accept the choice of the people.
CIPHER.436.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Petro Poroshenko, written as a Fractionated Morse Cipher. You are told that the quote starts with EVERY. What does it say?
CIPHER.436.author: Petro Poroshenko

CIPHER.418.cipherString: When I come up against the real world, I just vacillate.
CIPHER.418.question: Found on a microchip inside a disassembled robotics kit: this Baconian Cipher by Robert Crumb. What does it say?
CIPHER.418.author: Robert Crumb

CIPHER.426.question: A mysterious balloon release at the science fair carried this Cryptarithm banner. What do the values 24742 563189 09 decode to?

CIPHER.427.cipherString: Happy is the man who avoids dissension, but how fine is the man who is afflicted and shows endurance.
CIPHER.427.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Muhammad encoded in an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher contains the word THE twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.427.author: Muhammad

CIPHER.434.cipherString: Some things are more important than following the rules. Aren't they?
CIPHER.434.question: A glitch in the school's grading portal displayed this Porta encoded string by Django Wexler using a keyword of LAVISH. What does it say?
CIPHER.434.author: Django Wexler

CIPHER.429.cipherString: There's only one trick in software, and that is using a piece of software that's already been written.
CIPHER.429.question: While debugging a program, you find this hidden in the comments. It's a quote by Bill Gates, encrypted with an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What was the K2 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.429.author: Bill Gates

CIPHER.423.cipherString: I have always had the same personal statement: to gain knowledge and apply it back home.
CIPHER.423.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by Catherine Nakalembe encoded with a Checkerboard with a polybius key of MASTERFUL. What does it say?
CIPHER.423.author: Catherine Nakalembe

CIPHER.435.cipherString: The most terrifying words in the English language are: I'm from the government and I'm here to help.
CIPHER.435.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Ronald Reagan encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.435.author: Ronald Reagan

CIPHER.414.question: The janitor found this strange paper strip on some equipment in the closet. It's a quote, encoded with a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 9105 728 3406 decode to?

CIPHER.422.cipherString: Science is vastly more stimulating to the imagination than the classics.
CIPHER.422.question: Written in glow-in-the-dark ink on the ceiling of the bio lab, uncover this Complete Columnar quote by J. B. S. Haldane. The quote has IMAGIN somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.422.author: J. B. S. Haldane

CIPHER.431.cipherString: Haiku reading and writing can lead to a deeper understanding and appreciation of life and our environment.
CIPHER.431.question: A mysterious QR code on the back of a cereal box leads to this encrypted quote by William J. Higginson using the Aristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.431.author: William J. Higginson

CIPHER.432.cipherString: Every day is a new day, and you'll never be able to find happiness if you don't move on.
CIPHER.432.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Carrie Underwood, encrypted with a Checkerboard with a polybius key of TEACHINGS. What does it say?
CIPHER.432.author: Carrie Underwood

CIPHER.415.cipherString: I'm all about change, and I know things are going to move forward in life, and that's just how it goes.
CIPHER.415.question: Your robot vacuum just projected this message onto the ceiling. It's a quote by Kid Rock encoded with an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.415.author: Kid Rock

CIPHER.424.cipherString: Have as little suspicion as possible and conceal that.
CIPHER.424.question: Found inside a dissected frog's stomach (plastic, don’t worry): this Baconian note by John Lancaster Spalding. What does it say?
CIPHER.424.author: John Lancaster Spalding

CIPHER.419.cipherString: I don't think people buy technology products because of the personalities of the people behind them.
CIPHER.419.question: A mysterious app update added this Aristocrat lock screen—it's actually Jim Balsillie's quote using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains the word THE twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.419.author: Jim Balsillie

CIPHER.416.cipherString: Total absence of humor renders life impossible.
CIPHER.416.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote by Sidonie Gabrielle Colette, encrypted as a Nihilist Substitution Cipher using a keyword of CORTEX and Polybius key of CARBONIZED. What does it say?
CIPHER.416.author: Sidonie Gabrielle Colette

CIPHER.425.cipherString: Be saving, but not at the cost of all liberality. Have the soul of a king and the hand of a wise economist.
CIPHER.425.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from 1965. It's a quote by Joseph Joubert encrypted as an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.425.author: Joseph Joubert

CIPHER.420.cipherString: I want color and form to have contradictorily functions.
CIPHER.420.question: A vending machine just dispensed a candy wrapper with this Complete Columnar code by Josef Albers. The quote has CONTRAD somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.420.author: Josef Albers

CIPHER.421.cipherString: ¿Por qué no esperamos a que la vida en otros planetas nos encuentre? ¿Por qué tenemos que hacer todo el trabajo?
CIPHER.421.question: You receive this puzzling text during a live science broadcast. It contains a quote in Spanish, encrypted as a Xenocrypt using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.421.author: Unknown
CIPHER.421.translation: Why don't we wait for life on other planets to find us? Why do we have to do all the work?

CIPHER.430.cipherString: When you honor the precepts of life, and fulfil your purpose, you will be delighted by its magnificence.
CIPHER.430.question: Your microscope slide prep strangely revealed this Complete Columnar message by Gift Gugu Mona. The quote has FLIFE somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.430.author: Gift Gugu Mona

CIPHER.433.cipherString: Monkeys, who very sensibly refrain from speech lest they should be set to earn their livings.
CIPHER.433.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by Kenneth Grahame encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.433.author: Kenneth Grahame

CIPHER.428.cipherString: The older we get, the more our eyes hold, the more expressive it gets!
CIPHER.428.question: A message in a bottle washed up in the school's decorative fountain—decode this Nihilist Substitution cipher text by RJ Yolande Mendes with a keyword of THINGS and polybius key of FATIGUED. What does it say?
CIPHER.428.author: RJ Yolande Mendes

CIPHER.412.cipherString: You have to remember children are not usually very interested in what their parents do for a living.
CIPHER.412.question: This string of symbols appears on the display of a malfunctioning calculator. It hides a quote by Julianne Moore, encoded as an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher starts with You. What does it say?
CIPHER.412.author: Julianne Moore

CIPHER.411.question: Found taped under a desk in study hall: this Hill puzzle by Bitsy Kemper encoded with a keyword of THUD. What does it say?
CIPHER.411.author: Bitsy Kemper

CIPHER.417.cipherString: Every reform, however necessary, will by weak minds be carried to an excess, that itself will need reforming.
CIPHER.417.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote by Samuel Taylor Coleridge, written as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains the word will twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.417.author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge

CIPHER.413.cipherString: Today is yours to shape. Create a masterpiece!
CIPHER.413.question: The school's ancient overhead projector flickered and burned this Baconian message onto the screen of a quote by Steve Maraboli. You are told that the deciphered text starts with TODA. What does it say?
CIPHER.413.author: Steve Maraboli
